alertsTemplate.pageDescription: Manage your notification templates for alerts.
alertsTemplate.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the template "{name}"? This action is irreversible.
alertsTemplate.fieldCriticalityDesc: Severity level — controls color-coding and icon in notifications
alertsTemplate.fieldRetryTimesDesc: Switch to the next preferred medium after this many alert occurrences (0 = disabled)
alertsTemplate.fieldRetryMinDesc: Switch to the next preferred medium if the alert is not resolved within this delay (0 = disabled)
alertsTemplate.fieldPreferredDesc: Add channels in the desired priority order
alertsTemplate.fieldGlobalDesc: If enabled, this template is visible to all connected users
alertsTemplate.sectionOpenDesc: Messages sent when the alert fires. At least one locale is required.
alertsTemplate.sectionCloseDesc: Messages sent when the alert ends (optional).
alertsTemplate.noLanguage: No language configured — use the selector in the header to add one
alertsTemplate.noMedium: No channel configured for this locale
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-name-too-long: The template name must not exceed 100 characters
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-description-too-long: The template description must not exceed 500 characters
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-behavior-required: A valid behavior must be selected
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-open-required: At least one open message locale is required
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-locale-required: Each message block must specify a locale
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-medium-required: Each locale must contain at least one medium and its message
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-message-required: The message text must not be empty
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-title-required: The title is required for EMAIL, PUSH and DEFAULT channels
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-global-forbidden: Only administrators can create or update global templates
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-update-forbidden: You can only modify templates that you own
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-delete-forbidden: You can only delete templates that you own
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-not-found: The requested alert template was not found
alertsTemplate.alerts-template-deleted: The alert template has been deleted
alertsTemplate.backendTimeout: The backend did not respond within the expected time. Please try again later.
alertsTemplate.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
